title: Visited Dr. Usha Mallinath (Pediatric Neurologist)
text: we were very much impressed by the way she dealt with out child . Highly Professional and a very transparent person in her approach .She took complete input from us and child was completely examined . we were amazed the way she was talking and dealing with child in that critical situation too . That was a positive reinforcement for our son . we were given ample information about the condition , the possible causes and need to do relevant investigations. we followed all her advice .
